Empty watchlist: 0 candidates. NOTABLE: this run executed mid-session (~12:38 PM ET / 16:38 UTC), not pre-open, yet rel_vol still rejects every symbol. Prior agents recommended re-running later so current-day volume accumulates -- that did not help. This confirms the empty watchlist is structural, not a timing issue: rel_vol = today cumulative daily-bar volume / prior full-day volume can rarely exceed 1.5x intraday on the IEX feed, and the gap-up gate compounds it. Recommend a maintenance fix to premarket_scan.py (e.g. use minute-bar relative volume vs. time-of-day baseline, or relax the rel_vol/gap thresholds) rather than re-running.
